productDisplayName: Nike Men As Squad Ft C Black Sweatshirts
description: Composition Black printed round neck sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves, ribs made of 96% cotton and 4% spandex, a lined hood and drawcord for warmth, ribbed sides, cuffs and hems for snug Fit, graphic print and branding on the chest, and kangaroo pocket with cord-management feature to keep media-player cords out of the way Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean The nike Squad is built for comfort in a classic profile. The nike Squad Fleece Hoodie offers plush comfort and a soft interior for lasting warmth. An active fit with a sporty silhouette, this hoodie is a versatile everyday essential.
